3101290.name: Dinos
3101290.description:
Hatch eggs, collect dinosaurs, and trade them with friends!
Get free eggs every few hours and trade your extra dinosaurs for more eggs!
Your dinosaur egg will hatch on its own, but you can click on it to make it hatch faster!
View your dinosaur collection in the inventory and display them in-game!
Choose your background to create a picture-perfect environment for your dinosaur!
New sets of dinosaurs are released periodically!
Are you interested in designing more Dinosaurs? We will have community-created sets released in the future!

Features:
Achievements
collectible dinosaurs
Steam inventory integration
Community design submissions
New sets of Dinosaurs released periodically
Customizable backdrops for creating the perfect environment for your dinosaur

New features are planned for release soon! Join the community for a sneak peak and to help influence the direction of the game.
3101290.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
